interpretation: Within the birth_probability outcome family, more non-child old-age security lowers fertility on average on the probability_of_birth scale.
caveat: Outcome-specific pooled summary; treatment scales differ, so this is not a single structural treatment effect.

interpretation: Within the completed_fertility outcome family, more non-child old-age security lowers fertility on average on the births_per_woman scale.
